prompt: Vertical portrait 9:16 high-resolution atlas world map for an Iron Kingdoms inspired Full Metal Fantasy RPG setting. Terrain type: single_continent. Draw one immense fictional Immoren-like continent in steampunk fantasy cartography with mechanikal detail overlay, brass-and-soot palette, steam and magic intertwined. Include mechanikal factory-cities, warjack assembly ports, steam-vented ruins, rail lines, border war fronts, rival industrial nations, river city hubs like Corvis, Cygnaran-style storm-tech provinces, Khadoran frozen fortresses, Menite theocratic temple-fortresses, elven arcane enclaves, Rhulic dwarf mountain holds, blighted marshes, alchemical wastelands, arcane storm fronts, smoking chimneys, warjack smoke plumes, and lightning-charged ley lines. The continent must span many climates and biomes: temperate riverlands, snowy northern tundra, alpine mountains, blighted marshes, industrial wastelands, dense forests, dry badlands, volcanic forge regions, storm coasts, and fertile contested plains. Coastline must be realistic and complex with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, river deltas, fjords, barrier islands, sea caves, and varied landforms. Include irregular offshore islands in uneven clusters, all different sizes and shapes, some with foundries, naval forts, arcane towers, and warjack docks. Large detailed atlas composition, mechanical compass and riveted border allowed, no readable labels, no legible text, no logos, no modern satellite style.
